attacks.name: Single-Horn Throw
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Worry Seed
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Power Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, attacks used by this Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Forest Breath
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your [G] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

abilities.name: Speed Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Ragin’ Mad Strike
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.text: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Vigor Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, attacks used by this Pokémon cost 1 less [C] Energy.

abilities.name: Snowy Terrain
abilities.text: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Zone Smash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.text: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Resilience Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.text: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flash
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

attacks.name: Moonblast
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −30 damage.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent reveals a random card from their hand and shuffles it into their deck.

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: CHECK
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may choose either player. Look at the top card of that player's deck.

abilities.name: Speed Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Dash Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Headbutt
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Rolling Spin
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Rolling Spin attack does +60 damage.

abilities.name: Power Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, attacks used by this Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Kick Shot
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

abilities.name: Cunning Link
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, you may do 30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Toxic
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Do 20 damage to this Pokémon instead of the usual amount for this Special Condition.

abilities.name: Resilience Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Iron Beam Breaker
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Metal Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Defensive Unit
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Time Mash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Crisis Dive
attacks.text: Discard 2 random Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Collapse
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Silent Wing
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals their hand.

attacks.name: Brave Bird
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Sky Support
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Basic Pokemon's Retreat Cost is 1 less.

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.text: Discard a random Energy from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Fabled Luster
abilities.text: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.
